wishText: Happy birthday, Thifa—welcome to your quarter-life crisis era, semoga selalu diberi keberkahan, kebahagiaan, dan dimudahkan dalam menemukan jalan hidupmu 🎂✨! *ignore that hijabi selgom lol ;)
textInChatBox: Happy birthday to you!! Yeee! Many many happy blah...
text2: That's what I was going to do.
outroText: Okay, thankyou for spending time for this, i hope you liked it.
